name: Light Rays
description: Volumetric light ray effect via WebGL with radial angular modulation and mouse-reactive light source positioning.
accessibility_notes: bright rays may affect photosensitive users

rayCount.description: Number of light rays radiating from source

color.description: RGB color array for the light rays

mouseReactive.description: Whether the light source follows mouse position

className.description: CSS class for the canvas element

conflicts: WebGL required — no fallback for unsupported browsers
mouse reactivity has no touch equivalent
